import { __decorate } from "tslib"; import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, ViewEncapsulation } from '@angular/core'; /** * Header app-level en 3 zones (cf. décision J.1). * * Slots ng-content : * ```html * * * * Se connecter * * ``` * * Aucune logique métier hardcodée. L'app insère ce qu'elle veut dans * la zone actions (auth, notifications, profil, etc., cf. J.5). */ let OriHeaderComponent = class OriHeaderComponent { }; OriHeaderComponent = __decorate([ Component({ selector: 'ori-header', standalone: true, changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush, encapsulation: ViewEncapsulation.None, template: `
`, }) ], OriHeaderComponent); export { OriHeaderComponent };
